title: Replace remaining line-oriented parser shortcuts with structured expression parsing
goal: Move selfhost/parser.tya away from ad hoc line patterns and toward structured parsing that can represent the remaining Tya expression forms.
context: Start with the highest-priority parser gap from SELFHOST_WORK.md.
Prefer one feature slice that unlocks the next unsupported example.
Keep node output deterministic and compatible with checker/codegen migration.
steps: Add parser coverage for the next missing expression or statement family from the gap list.
Represent the feature with explicit node kinds rather than string-only placeholders.
Update selfhost/checker.tya and selfhost/codegen_c.tya minimally if needed to preserve existing checks.
Add tests that compare self-host parser behavior against the Go parser subset or fixture expectations.
done_when: At least one previously unsupported parser gap is implemented with explicit nodes.
Existing stage bootstrap behavior remains stable.
SELFHOST_WORK.md identifies the next parser gap.
